rekognition.collection.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Rekognition::Collection` type creates a server-side container called a collection. You can use a collection to store information about detected faces and search for known faces in images, stored videos, and streaming videos.

rekognition.collection.CollectionId.Description: ID for the collection that you are creating.

rekognition.collection.Tags.Description: A set of tags (key-value pairs) that you want to attach to the collection.
